summary: Architecture Hardening Pass - All 25 guardrail tests pass. Verified 6 new extracted modules are importable, settings endpoints use deps not server, route count stable at 427, and all key endpoints work correctly. Frontend login and settings page render properly.

minor.issue: Returns 'Graph token error' when testing with invalid tenant - expected behavior since DEMO_MODE was toggled off during testing
Returns 'BC token error' when testing with invalid tenant - expected behavior

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Deprecation warnings for regex param (should use pattern) in bc_sandbox.py and pilot.py - non-blocking
Minor: PydanticDeprecatedSince20 warning for min_items in inventory_ledger.py (should use min_length) - non-blocking
Minor: on_event deprecation in main.py (should use lifespan event handlers) - non-blocking
context_for_next_testing_agent: Architecture hardening complete. 6 new modules extracted: graph_access.py, settings_helpers.py, sharepoint_helpers.py, bc_draft_service.py, document_linking.py, email_helpers.py. Routers no longer import server.py except mailbox_sources.py (allowed). Services no longer import server.py except document_handlers.py (allowed). Route count stable at 427.

settings_endpoints_verified./api/settings/test-connection graph: Returns response (token error expected with invalid tenant)
settings_endpoints_verified./api/settings/test-connection bc: Returns response (token error expected with invalid tenant)

frontend_verified.dashboard: Loads after login with all metrics
frontend_verified.settings_page: Displays connection status, folder structure, Demo Mode Active banner

mocked_apis_note: Microsoft Graph email API, BC write operations, and JWT Auth (Entra ID) are MOCKED in demo mode
